Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Number of times 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurs in the entire event log
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities

Name: Percentage of process variants that include 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' following 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' that occur after 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Ratio of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurrences to 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' occurrences
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of process instances where 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' appears exactly once
Metric: the sum of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities that are part of accepted manuscript trajectories (i.e., preceded by 'RW-EIC Accept')
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'RW-EIC Accept'

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' in variants with performance duration above the median
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurring in the final phase of the review process (i.e., after any EIC decision activity such as 'SW-EIC Accept', 'RW-EIC Accept', etc.)
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of times 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' is directly preceded by 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities for cases where activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' occurs

Name: Percentage of all 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' events that are followed by 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' compared to other post-acceptance activities like 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Percentage of process variants ending with 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' or activities immediately after it
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Number of cases where 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' marks the transition from editorial evaluation to production workflow, as inferred from the ACM journal review process description
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities
